name: Bacterial Glycerol Stock

notes.en: Mix gently by inversion (do not vortex). Label tube with strain name, plasmid, resistance marker, and date. Snap-freeze in liquid nitrogen or dry ice, store at −80°C. To recover, streak directly onto selective plate from frozen stock. Never freeze-thaw. Final glycerol concentration of 15–25% is acceptable.
notes.zh: 轻柔混匀 (不要涡旋)。标记菌株名、质粒、抗性、日期。速冻于液氮或干冰，-80°C 长期保存。复苏时直接划线至含抗生素 LB 平板，切勿反复冻融。终甘油浓度 15–25% 均可。

ref: Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning, 3rd ed., CSHL Press
